name: One-Pan Garlic Butter Shrimp Pasta
description: Succulent shrimp in a silky garlic-butter and white wine sauce tossed with linguine — a restaurant-worthy dinner in about 20 minutes, all in one pan.
keywords: pasta, shrimp, seafood, quick dinner, one-pan

recipeInstructions.text: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine until al dente. Reserve some pasta water, then drain.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 1

recipeInstructions.text: Pat the shrimp dry and season with salt and pepper.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 2

recipeInstructions.text: Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat, then add the garlic and cook until fragrant.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 3

recipeInstructions.text: Add the shrimp and cook about 2 minutes per side, until pink and opaque.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 4

recipeInstructions.text: Pour in the white wine and lemon juice and let the sauce reduce for about a minute.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 5

recipeInstructions.text: Add the drained pasta straight into the skillet with a splash of reserved pasta water and toss to coat.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 6

recipeInstructions.text: Finish with parmesan, fresh parsley, and a pinch of red pepper flakes. Serve immediately.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 7
